reach_why: Mostly extends familiar critiques of priors, proxy optimization, and language-only reasoning; little genuinely new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously combines scaling dependence, proxy-judging, mathematical limits, and absurd true premises into one cautionary frame.
falsifiable_why: Testable via systems that discover truths without direct feedback, or formal results separating language critique from mathematics.
explanation: Architecture-only discovery risks inherited-scale, judge-pleasing, language-bound outputs rather than robust truth-tracking.
